title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at DXC Technology India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at DXC Technology India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DXC Technology India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About DXC Technology India:
DXC Technology India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
